claim: VERIFIED: Evidence chain validates claim without assumptions promoted to facts. Explorer and cross-checker both provided 15 project-scoped evidence items with accurate path/line citations. Assumptions arrays are empty. Missing data items are documented in missing/risks arrays, not presented as facts. Acceptance criteria met: agents cite project paths (src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts, src/demand/router.ts, __tests__/demand-evidence-dispatch.test.ts, .yolo/demand/evidence/dispatch-*/.json) with line numbers, and boundary audit implementation is confirmed by cross-check.

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Path exists and line range matches gitFiles() implementation. Explorer and cross-checker citations accurate.
evidence.why: Confirms evidence agent path citations are valid and implementation matches claim

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Path exists, line range covers runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() including boundaryBefore capture (line 511), boundaryAfter capture (line 561), diff (line 562), blocker injection (lines 580-585)
evidence.why: Confirms boundary audit integration that blockers remain active until resolved

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Test exists at cited path, writes unexpected-project-write.txt, expects blocked status with BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION, validates boundary violation detection
evidence.why: Confirms test coverage for tracked mutation detection and PRD blocking

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Test exists at cited path, inits git repo, writes untracked-mutation.txt, expects violation with change path 'untracked-mutation.txt'
evidence.why: Confirms test coverage for untracked mutation detection

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Explorer agent result exists, contains 8 evidence citations with paths (src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts, __tests__/demand-evidence-dispatch.test.ts) and line numbers
evidence.why: Real evidence agent artifact confirming path citation pattern

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Cross-checker agent result exists, contains 15 CONFIRMED evidence items with accurate path/line citations, conflicts array empty
evidence.why: Real cross-check agent artifact confirming independent verification

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Path exists, inspectDemandPrdReadiness() iterates requiredEvidenceAgents, calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues() for each result
evidence.why: Confirms PRD readiness logic processes evidence agent blockers

evidence.summary: VERIFIED: Path exists, evidenceResultBlockingIssues() checks recommendation, verdict, missing array to determine if agent result blocks PRD
evidence.why: Confirms missing/unresolved evidence becomes PRD blockers

risks: Evidence agents might cite paths incorrectly in future dispatches without cross-check validation
Missing test coverage for non-git boundary behavior could hide platform-specific bugs
Missing stress-test evidence with full Claude agents means boundary audit is only unit-tested, not integration-tested with real agent workloads

result.notes: Evidence chain valid: no assumptions presented as facts (assumptions arrays empty), evidence paths verified as usable with accurate line numbers, missing data properly documented in missing/risks arrays instead of being promoted to facts. Acceptance criteria met: explorer and cross-checker both cite specific project paths with line numbers, and boundary audit implementation is cross-checked and confirmed. Remaining blockers are evidence-agent-result-required blockers awaiting this verifier result.
